input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact has a transitive runtime dependency on org.javassist:javassist:3.29.0-GA for expression compilation; Gradle resolves it from ognl:ognl:3.3.5, so no extra testImplementation entry is needed unless transitive dependencies are disabled.
Existing 3.2.21 tests contain JDK-internal and SecurityManager-focused cases; those are compatibility/test-design risks on JDK 25, not evidence of required pre-generation setup.
Tests that deliberately inspect OGNL's JDK9+ AccessibleObjectHandler internals may need module-opening JVM args, but ordinary public OGNL API coverage does not require that setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process expression/property navigation library; the resolved artifact only needs its normal transitive Javassist dependency and no external service, Docker image, environment variable, or system property before meaningful tests can exercise parsing, get/set, method invocation, collection/map, constructor, and conversion behavior.
